data.title: Alamo Group Inc. (NYSE: ALG) completes acquisition of Petersen Industries, a specialized equipment manufacturer.
data.description: In Seguin, Texas on January 26, 2026, Alamo Group Inc. (NYSE: ALG), a prominent worldwide producer of top-notch industrial and vegetation management machinery, revealed the successful finalization of the purchase of Petersen Industries. Petersen Industries is known for crafting specialized equipment.

data.title: Veris Residential (NYSE: VRE) reports tax treatment of 2025 Distributions, totaling $0.32 per share.
data.description: Veris Residential, Inc. (NYSE: VRE), a leading Northeast-focused Class A multifamily REIT based in Jersey City, N.J., disclosed the tax treatment of its 2025 Distributions on Jan. 26, 2026. The Company issued a total of $0.32 per share in distributions during the specified period.

data.title: Nanalysis closes second tranche to complete $3.4M offering, TSXV: NSCI, OTCQX: NSCIF, FRA: 1N1.
data.description: In Calgary, AB on January 26, 2026, Nanalysis Scientific Corp. (referred to as "the Company" or "Nanalysis") successfully completed the closing of the last tranche following its news releases on December 8 and December 23, 2025. The Company's stock symbols include TSXV: NSCI, OTCQX: NSCIF, FRA: 1N1.

data.title: Johnson Controls appoints Susan Hughes to lead Asia Pacific region, aiming to accelerate growth opportunities.
data.description: Experienced executive Susan Hughes has been appointed by Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI) to enhance operational efficiency and drive growth in the Asia Pacific region. The announcement was made on Jan. 26, 2026, in CORK, Ireland. Johnson Controls is a key player in creating intelligent, healthy, and eco-friendly buildings worldwide. Hughes' leadership aims to accelerate business opportunities in the region.

data.title: Crane Company had a strong Q4 2025 with 21% increase in adjusted EPS and 5.4% growth in core sales.
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, Crane Company (NYSE: CR) released their financial report for Q4 of 2025 and provided projections for full-year 2026 adjusted EPS. Max Mitchell, the Chairman, President, and CEO of Crane, expressed enthusiasm over the results. The quarter showcased a remarkable 21% surge in adjusted EPS and a 5.4% rise in core sales, emphasizing their focus on technical and commercial prowess and operational efficiency.

data.title: Universal Display Corp. will announce 4Q25/FY25 results on Feb. 19, 2026, followed by a 5:00 p.m. ET earnings call.
data.description: In Ewing, New Jersey, Universal Display Corporation has announced that they will be releasing their fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on February 19, 2026. Following this release, they will be conducting an earnings conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day.

data.title: Americold appoints Chris Papa as CFO, expands executive roles, reaffirms 2025 AFFO outlook for growth plan.
data.description: Chris Papa has been named the new Chief Financial Officer of Americold, leading a transition in finance leadership and expanding executive roles within the company. This move comes as Americold reasserts its full-year 2025 Adjusted Funds from Operations (AFFO) outlook.

data.title: LXP Industrial Trust reports final 2025 dividend income allocations for common and preferred shares in accordance with IRS.
data.description: On Jan. 26, 2026, LXP Industrial Trust ("LXP"), a REIT specializing in Class A warehouse and distribution real estate, disclosed its 2025 dividend income allocations for common and preferred shares for reporting on Form 1099-DIV. The figures for Common Shares have not been adjusted post a 1-for-5 reverse stock split on Nov. 10, 2025. The return of capital for common shares was detailed on IRS Form 8937 as mandated by the U.S. tax basis reporting under Internal Revenue Code 6045B. For more information including the Form 8937, visit LXP's investor section on their website at https://ir.lxp.com/stock-info/Tax-Documents/Form-8937/default.aspx.

data.title: South Plains Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPFI) reports Q4 and year-end 2025 financial results for parent company City Bank.
data.description: In Lubbock, Texas on January 26, 2026, South Plains Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPFI), the holding company of City Bank, released its financial performance for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2025.
NBT Bancorp Inc. releases 2025 full-year results and declares cash dividend for shareholders.

data.title: Park National Corp. (PRK) reports 2025 results, declares $1.10 quarterly cash dividend per common share.
data.description: In a press release dated January 26, 2026, Park National Corporation (Park) announced its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company, listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol PRK, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.10 per common share. This dividend is set to be distributed on March 10, 2026, to common shareholders recorded as of February 20, 2026.

data.title: ONEOK adds Mark A. McCollum and Precious Williams Owodunni to its board of directors.
data.description: Mark A. McCollum and Precious Williams Owodunni have been appointed to the Board of Directors at ONEOK. McCollum brings valuable expertise from his previous role as CFO of Halliburton, and Owodunni possesses a strong background in corporate governance. This decision increases the total number of board members to 14. The new additions are expected to provide fresh perspectives and contribute to the strategic direction of the company.

data.title: Timberland Bancorp's Q1 net income: $8.2M, up from $6.8M a year ago, but down from $8.45M last quarter.
data.description: In Hoquiam, Washington, on January 26, 2026, Timberland Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSBK) disclosed that it had achieved a net income of $8.22 million, equivalent to $1.04 per diluted common share in the fourth quarter of 2025. This marks a rise from the $6.86 million net income, translating to $0.86 per diluted common share reported in the same quarter the previous year, and a slight drop from the $8.45 million net income, or $1.07 per diluted common share, recorded in the preceding quarter.

data.title: Rush Street Interactive (NYSE: RSI) will release Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 17, 2026, with a conference call scheduled.
data.description: In Chicago on January 26, 2026, Rush Street Interactive, Inc. (NYSE: RSI) disclosed plans to unveil its performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after the market closes on Tuesday, February 17, 2026. An associated conference call is scheduled for 6:00 pm Eastern Time (5:00 pm Central Time) on the same day to analyze the outcomes.

data.title: The Manitowoc Company, Inc. will announce Q4 2025 and full-year 2025 results on Feb 9, 2026, with a conference call on Feb 10, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. Website for webcast: http://ir.manitowoc.com.
data.description: The Manitowoc Company, Inc. (NYSE: MTW) based in Milwaukee is set to unveil its fourth-quarter and full-year results for 2025 on February 9, 2026, post-market closure. Following this, on February 10, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET (9:00 a.m. CT), the company will conduct a conference call to deliberate on the results and future prospects. The call can be accessed through webcast at http://ir.manitowoc.com in the “Events & Presentations” segment.

data.title: Curbline Properties Corp. (NYSE: CURB) to hold Q4 earnings call on Feb 9, 2026 at 8:00AM, releasing results for quarter ended Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Curbline Properties Corp. (NYSE: CURB) disclosed that its financial and operational outcomes for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, will be unveiled before market initiation on February 9, 2026. The Company specializes in convenience shopping centers situated on curblines at busy intersections and major vehicular routes in affluent suburban areas. Their quarterly earnings conference call and audio webcast are scheduled for February 9.
